description: TextCrdt delta synchronization (#lztextsync, cell-model.md § Delta sync). Pins the three load-bearing operations over the same Fugue/RGA element set as textcrdt_convergence.json: `version_vector()` (greatest OpId counter per peer, taken over BOTH insert ids and tombstone delete ids), `delta_since(their_vv)` (the ops a partner has not observed), and `apply_delta(ops)` (same commutative/associative/idempotent algebra as merge). A whole-state snapshot is `delta_since({})`, and rebuilding a replica by `apply_delta`-ing it preserves every character's OpId so a later concurrent edit still merges conflict-free — unlike re-parsing, which mints fresh ids and duplicates on merge. Identity preservation is the linchpin: scenarios 2-3 fail (content duplication) if `apply_delta` does not retain OpIds.

scenarios.name: version vector covers inserts and tombstone delete ids
bidirectional delta exchange converges (concurrent insert + delete)
whole-snapshot fork preserves identity; concurrent edit still merges
delta apply is idempotent (re-applying a delta is a no-op)
